expectations.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool
Output contains valid Gherkin syntax with Feature:, Scenario:, Given, When, Then keywords
expectations.evidence: Agent planned 3 feature files but did not create them

expectations.text: A scenario for successful login with email and password exists
A scenario for account lockout after 3 failed attempts exists
A scenario for password reset via email exists
At least one error/edge case scenario exists
Scenarios use declarative style - no CSS selectors, no HTTP verbs, no UI implementation details
At least one .feature file was written to the filesystem
